The analogy then drawn by Berkhof and [The Baptist Examiner ]{.class_4095}is a distorted one and is a false one. Even though the sinner is spiritually [dead, he ]{.class_4095}is certainly responsible for his decisions (Acts 7:51). He can ACCEPT (John 1:12) or REJECT (Mark 7:9; Luke 7:30), in spite of his depravity (cf. Eph. 1:4 and comments).

["Wherein in time past ye WALKED" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 2; cf. Gal. 5:16 and comments). ["According to the course of this world ]{.class_4096}(vs. 2; cf. Col. 2:8). ["According to the PRINCE OF THE POWER OF THE AIR" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 2). This is the Prince of Daniel 9:26 and John 14:30, 16:11. He will be the Prince of Ezekiel 21:25, since he is the Prince of John 12:31. He is no more the leader of the "authority of the lower atmosphere" (Wuest) than Mayor LaGuardia was mayor of Easter Island.

["The spirit that now worketh IN THE CHILDREN OF DISOBEDIENCE" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 2) shows that the "Unclean Spirit" indwells the unbeliever exactly as the Holy Spirit indwells the believer (Matt. 12:43--45). The body of the unsaved man is the temple of the UNHOLY Ghost, and he is "led of his lord" exactly as the Christian is led by the Holy Spirit (1 Sam. 19:9--10). Unbelievers vary in degrees of demon‑possession and demoniac control, but in the Bible, all of them are denominated with such words as [Belial, darkness, unrighteousness, infidels, idols ]{.class_4095}(2 Cor. 6:16), [children of wrath ]{.class_4095}(2:3), [children of disobedience ]{.class_4095}(5:6), [children of Hell ]{.class_4095}(Matt. 23:15), [sons of the devil ]{.class_4095}(John 8:44), [generations of vipers ]{.class_4095}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_207}(Matt. 23:33), and [brute beasts ]{.class_4095}(2 Pet. 2:12).

This deliberate choice, by the Holy Spirit, of some of the most vicious words found in the human vocabulary mark the Bible as the world's masterpiece of hate literature and a book that must either be destroyed or altered before the world can "get together." The lists in Romans 1 and 3, with the lists in 1 Corinthians 6 and Galatians 5, tell mankind all too clearly what God thinks of them. In vain does the Hell‑bound sinner run to 1 Corinthians 13 and Psalm 23 for cover. The Lord is NOT his ["shepherd,"]{.class_4096} and God doesn't shepherd anyone but [His own sheep ]{.class_4095}(John 10:25--28).

["The children of disobedience"]{.class_4096} disobeyed the word (1 Pet. 2:8) and stumbled at the stumbling stone (Matt. 21:44), and ["the wrath of God"]{.class_4096} abides---present [tense, ]{.class_4095}Doctor!---on them (John 3:36). These rebels (Jer. 5:23; Isa. 1:2) are at enmity with God (Rom. 8:7); and their carnal minds are vain, darkened, ignorant, and defiled (Eph. 4:18; Tit. 1:15). The description is applicable to Theodore Roosevelt, Richard Nixon, Joe Namath, Raquel Welch, Pope Paul VI, Cardinal Cushing, Abraham Lincoln, Norman Mailer, Winston Churchill, Louis Armstrong, Abbie Hoffman, Isidore Reubin, David Ruben, Norman Vincent Peale, Jane Fonda, Dr. Albert Schweitzer, Albert Einstein, Sinclair Lewis, Fulton Sheen, Ho Chi Minh, the Smothers Brothers, Jack Benny, Johnny Cash, Red Skelton, Danny Thomas, Bing Crosby, and Eugene Carson Blake if the condition of John 1:12 has not been met.

Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown fall for Milton's [Paradise Lost ]{.class_4095}and offer us the fantastic interpretation that Satan has [already fallen ]{.class_4095}(Rev. 12:7--9) and can no longer "accuse the brethren" (Rev. 12:10)! Believe it or not, the passage in Revelation 12---which takes place in the middle of Daniel's Seventieth week---is said to have taken place in Acts 1 (Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown Commentary, pg. 1283)!

The inconsistent "new translations" [(ASV, New ASV, RV, RSV, New Jerusalem Bible, ]{.class_4095}etc.) have translated ["children"]{.class_4096} as ["sons"]{.class_4095} (Gk., ["huios"]{.class_4095}) without regard for the Holy Spirit's interpretation---["children" ]{.class_4096}(Gk., ["tekna"]{.class_4095})---in the next verse. For those who think the two words call for two separate translations---Phenomenon No. 4---observe the [RV, RSV, ]{.class_4095}and [ASV ]{.class_4095}translating ["huios"]{.class_4095} as ["children" ]{.class_4096}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_208}in Luke 1:16; 2 Corinthians 3:7, 13; Revelation 2:14, 7:4, etc.

["Among whom also WE all had our conversation" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 3). That is, I, Paul, a Jew, as well as you Gentiles.

["IN the lusts of our flesh" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 3) shows that the believer was dead IN his ["trespasses and sins" ]{.class_4096}(see comments on vs. 1). The dative with ["en" ]{.class_4095}(Gk.) is used in both cases; and yet, the corrupt [American Standard Version, ]{.class_4095}with its apostate counterparts the [RV]{.class_4095} of[ ]{.class_4095}1881 and the [RSV]{.class_4095} of[ ]{.class_4095}1946, insists on translating[ "through"]{.class_4095} our sins in verse 5. The Vatican manuscript, so idolized by the translators of the [RV, RSV, ]{.class_4095}and [ASV, ]{.class_4095}even has the Greek preposition ["en" ]{.class_4095}in verse 5; yet, this time, it is ignored because it would validate the [King James ]{.class_4095}reading! Phenomenon No. 1!

["The desires of the flesh and of the mind" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 3). That sums up the whole matter. The truth of life is that 90 percent of the people in any generation do exactly what dogs and cats do. They seek [self‑gratification, self-preservation, ]{.class_4095}and [self‑propagation; ]{.class_4095}and that is all that needs to be said. People and animals share the same basic drives (Eccl. 3:18), and it is no wonder that Darwin and Anaximander got confused. Solomon knew of the matter before Anaximenes and Haeckel ever dreamed about it (Eccl. 3:20). People vary in what they consider to be the proper means of [self‑]{.class_4095}\
[preservation, self‑gratification, ]{.class_4095}and [self‑propagation; ]{.class_4095}but these three fundamentals stand. All animals operate on the same principles. Only the New Birth can give a human being a purpose for living and a set of values based on something beyond these three drives. Paul was driven by impulses and motives that had nothing to do with [self‑preservation ]{.class_4095}(2 Cor. 11--12), [self‑gratification ]{.class_4095}(Phil. 4:11), or [self‑propagation ]{.class_4095}(1 Cor. 9:5); and the Lord Jesus was never influenced by ONE of them. That is, there is a greater difference between a Spirit‑filled Christian and an [unsaved Bishop or Cardinal ]{.class_4095}than there is between Karl Marx and a [racoon. ]{.class_4095}(Preach that next week and see how many friends you make!)

Further, the demoniac powers and principalities which control, drive, and guide the unsaved masses lead them to attack the Bible, imitate the Bible, ridicule the Bible, quote the Bible, and fulfill the BibleUNCONSCIOUSLY. The briefest review of English literature, including magazines, newspapers, comic strips, political cartoons, []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_209}feature articles, human interest stories, plays, dramas, movies, "soap operas," and essays, will reveal ["the prince of the power of the air" ]{.class_4096}working overtime in ["the children of disobedience" ]{.class_4096}and guiding their thoughts, brushes, pens, and typewriters against the revealed will of God in the Holy Bible. (See extended comments in [The Bible Believer's Commentary on Genesis, ]{.class_4095}Gen. 3.)

["And were BY NATURE the children of wrath, even as others" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 3). Again, the comment by Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown is excellent. They have caught the idea exactly. Even Paul, who lived a life ["blameless"]{.class_4096} in regard to the Law (Phil. 3:4--6), classifies himself with the heathen "dogs" at Ephesus who committed sodomy and fornication as part of their worship of Diana. The first birth of flesh is the Adamic birth in the image of the earthly (1 Cor. 15:47). ["Nature" ]{.class_4096}is ["set on fire of hell" ]{.class_4096}(James 3:6); consequently, ["the]{.class_4096} [natural man receiveth not the things of the Spirit of God" ]{.class_4096}(1 Cor. 2:14).

That is, it is just as easy for a rattlesnake to understand a table of logarithms as it would be for Martin Luther King Jr. to understand Daniel's Seventieth Week (Dan. 9:24--27). No animal can bridge the gap between the highest animal and the lowest man, and no man can bridge the gap between the highest man and the lowest ["god" ]{.class_4096}(2 Cor. 4:4). You must be born of the Spirit (John 3:5) to understand ["the things of the Spirit"]{.class_4096} (1 Cor. 2:14), and until then, you are ["by nature"]{.class_4096} a child of wrath (John 3:36). The fact that the [New English Bible]{.class_4095} (1961) has remove the word ["wrath" ]{.class_4096}from John 3:36; Ephesians 2:3; Matthew 3:7; Romans 1:18, 2:5, 8, 4:15; and Colossians 3:6 means little or nothing.

You see, C. H. Dodd ("the most qualified Biblical scholar in England"!) was a milksop. The lily‑hearted, fainthearted, pigeon‑hearted, chicken‑hearted, and "fraidy cats" (original Sanskrit for "yellow‑belly") can't stand such nasty old Anglo‑Saxon words as [Hell]{.class_4095} and [wrath,]{.class_4095} so they write them as "hades" and "retribution." This time (Eph. 2:3), it is only a "dreadful judgment" we are to look out for! Oh, dear me!

Verse 3 wreaks havoc with such expressions as "man's noble nature" and "man is made in the image of God" and "there is a spark of divinity in each of us." Man is made in Adam's image (Gen. 5:2--3), []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_210}his nature is against obedience to God (Rom. 8:3--6), and his "spark of divinity" is kindled from the fires of Hell (Prov. 15:11); and his history proves it. [The Naked and the Dead ]{.class_4095}(Norman Mailer) is a much more realistic portrayal of the AVERAGE LIFE of the AVERAGE man throughout the centuries than anything written by Churchill, LaTourette, Newman, Schaff, Pliny, Josephus, Plutarch, Eusebius, Dollinger, Van Loon, Darwin, Paley, Lyell, Huxley, Spengler, Gibbon, Bulwer, or Shaw. (See extensive treatment in [The Sure Word of Prophecy,]{.class_4095} 1969.)

["BUT GOD, who is rich in mercy\...wherewith he loved us" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 4). Most Calvinists forget that He loved the WORLD (John 3:16) and that His mercy extends to all of His works and His creation (Matt. 9:13; Rom. 11:31--32); instead, they dote on Romans 9:16, 18 which deal with an Old Testament incident before the Mosaic Law. Williams states the Calvinistic position well (Commentary, pg. 921). God "does everything." You do not have to accept Christ; you do not have to repent and believe. (As a Bullingerite in Mobile, Alabama, once said: "If you were to accept Christ, that would be WORKS. You can only be saved by believing; any accepting would be a work on your part!")

By disengaging Ephesians 2:4 from Ephesians 1:12--13, Calvin worked out a system whereby God loved the ELECT enough to quicken them but did not love the REPROBATE enough to quicken them. This obviously leads to [Irresistible Grace ]{.class_4095}and [Limited Atonement ]{.class_4095}(see comments under 1:4--5). However, the clear statement of Scripture is that God "quickened" nobody until they TRUSTED Jesus Christ as their Saviour---[after hearing the Gospel ]{.class_4095}(see comments under 1:12--13). To omit the "trusting" and sever it from the "quickening" is to pull the same trick on the Christian that Calvin pulled when he severed John 1:13 from John 1:12. Observe that John 1:12 [precedes ]{.class_4095}the New Birth (John 1:13), and to say that ["the will of man" ]{.class_4096}in verse 13 negates the dead sinner receiving Christ is insane. The man WILLS to receive Christ, and upon his willingness to RECEIVE, he is quickened by the New Birth, which GOD WILLS! (Calvin, as Bullinger, often majored in "wrongly dividing the word of truth.")

["BUT God"]{.class_4096} (vs. 4). Thank God for the disjunctive conjunction! []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_211}(Cf. Gen. 6:8; 1 Cor. 2:10; Rom. 5:8, 6:17, etc.)

["Wherewith he loved us"! ]{.class_4096}(vs. 4). That is the mystery! That mystery will surpass the mystery of the "Body," ["the mystery of iniquity"]{.class_4096} (2 Thess. 2:3--9), the mystery of the Virgin Birth (1 Tim. 3:16), the mystery of Israel (Rom. 11:25), and the mystery of the Rapture (1 Cor. 15:51--52). How does the Almighty Creator come to love a speck of dust (Psa. 8:4) in the back end of a universe that sports stars 300 times the size of our sun?

How does a Spiritual Being, who had no beginning and will have no end, find it within His attributes to love a creature that is fittingly described as ["a]{.class_4096} [worm"]{.class_4096} (Psa. 22:6)? Do you know of many men who would die for a WORM?

["HIS GREAT LOVE wherewith he loved us"]{.class_4096}! Blaikie ([Pulpit Commentary]{.class_4095}),[ ]{.class_4095}Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown, Dr. A. Martin ([Wycliffe Commentary]{.class_4095}), and Dummelow slide by the verse like it was of less importance than the date of the writing of the epistle! But who could withhold comment if he had experienced this ["GREAT LOVE"]{.class_4096} of which the Holy Spirit speaks? Just one hymnal contains 490 songs written about this ["GREAT LOVE."]{.class_4096} Four hundred ninety songs about one man? Can you find a hundred written for Lenin, Marx, Stalin, Trotsky, Ho Chi Minh, or Mao Tse-tung? Fifty? Forty? What is there about Communism and Socialism that kills the music in man's soul? How [is it that 40,000,000 Communists and 80,000,000 Socialists cannot even write one hymn book praising some man as their ultimate confidence and hope?]{.class_4095}

Cowper, overwhelmed by the ["GREAT LOVE," ]{.class_4096}writes, "There is a Fountain Filled with Blood." Everest stands hypnotized on Golgotha and writes, "Take Up Thy Cross." Huntingdon bathes in the ["GREAT LOVE" ]{.class_4096}until he can truthfully say, "I Love to Tell the Story." Robinson is so obsessed with the magnitude of this love that he calls, "Come Thou Fount of Every Blessing!" And on it goes---"Oh Love of God," "It Took a Miracle!" "Amazing Grace," "The Half Has Not Been Told," "Oh for a Thousand Tongues to Sing!" "Jesus Lover of My Soul," "No One Ever Cared for Me Like Jesus!"

Either somebody is crazy, or there is a ["GREAT LOVE"]{.class_4096} being dispensed to somebody! How do you account for thousands of "crazy" people in every century since Paul wrote of the ["GREAT LOVE"]{.class_4096}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_212}? Do YOU know anything about it? "Oh How Marvelous!" "Tell Me the Old, Old Story," "I Need Thee Every Hour," "More LOVE to Thee," "Jesus LOVES Me, This I Know!" You see, it is not a two‑sided affair. It is not "God loves everybody, and if we are good little boys and girls, we'll go to Heaven, and if we are bad little boys and girls, we are liable to go to Purgatory for a while!" No, no! It is---

1.[ "Christ died for the UNGODLY"]{.class_4096} (Rom. 5:6).

2\. Christ died for those ["WITHOUT STRENGTH"]{.class_4096} (Rom. 5:6).

3\. Christ came to seek SINNERS (Luke 19:10).

4\. Christ came to save sinners (Luke 19:10).

5\. Christ died for TRANSGRESSORS (Isa. 53:3--8).

6\. Christ died for murderers and blasphemers (1 Tim. 1:13--15).

7\. Christ died for HIS ENEMIES! (Rom. 5:10).

Do you know of anyone who loves you this much? ["For his GREAT LOVE wherewith he loved us"!]{.class_4096}

["Hath quickened us TOGETHER WITH CHRIST" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 5). We have already commented on the first clause under verse 1.

Our [spiritual ]{.class_4095}resurrection is past; our [physical ]{.class_4095}resurrection is future. The Postmillennial and Amillennial heretics of Paul's day, who taught that ["the first resurrection"]{.class_4096} (Rev. 20:5) was already past, were turned over to Satan for the destruction of the flesh (2 Tim. 2:17--18, 1 Tim. 1:20). Spiritualizing the resurrection has been one of the great theological pastimes that has contradicted Biblical truth through nineteen centuries. The lie began under Origen (A.D. 185--254) and stretched out to every daily newspaper in the United States and Canada; it will be found on the "church page" of those "dailies" every Easter, or just before Easter. Again, the [King James ]{.class_4095}English produces the "unsearchable riches" that are so obscure in Wuest's "Greek nuggets."

1\. Christ's two births were [simultaneous; ]{.class_4095}yours are not.

2\. Christ's two resurrections were [simultaneous; ]{.class_4095}yours are not.

Isn't it amazing what can be gathered from the English text, by a third grader, that Ellicott, Trench, Alford, Lightfoot, Harrison, Huxtable, Salmond, Blaikie, Meyer, Wordsworth, Westcott, Hort, Clarke, Lange, Williams, and the "majority of leading scholars" could not find in the Greek?

Christ came by WATER (John 3:5; 1 John 5:5--7) and by BLOOD []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_213}(Acts 20:28) as the Son of man (Matt. 19:28) and the Son of God (Rom. 1:3--4). He had two natures as the Christian does, [but both of these natures were with Him at birth. ]{.class_4095}YOU must be "born AGAIN." Therefore, when the Holy Spirit quickened Him (1 Cor. 15:23) and raised Him from the dead (Rom. 8:11), He received the glorified flesh and bones (Luke 24:39) that you have YET to receive in the future (1 Cor. 15:49--50). It is at your spiritual rebirth that you are ["quickened\...together with Christ," ]{.class_4096}and this places you [spiritually ]{.class_4095}in ["the third heaven"]{.class_4096} where HE IS (vs. 6)!

["And hath RAISED US UP TOGETHER, and made us sit TOGETHER IN HEAVENLY PLACES IN CHRIST JESUS" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 6). In plainer words, you did NOT get your resurrection body when you got "quickened together with Him," and to spiritualize the literal resurrection of Revelation 20:14 is to handle the Bible as a demon! ["The first resurrection" ]{.class_4096}(Rev. 20:5) is plainly a reference to the first [physical ]{.class_4095}resurrection of [physical bodies, ]{.class_4095}and it is no more connected with Ephesians 2 than Charles Manson (1970--1971) was connected with Sir Edmund Hillary's Mt. Everest expedition.

The words ["by grace ye are saved"]{.class_4096} have been inserted by the Holy Spirit (vs. 5) as a reminder that God did not have to "quicken" anybody. Abraham was not "born again," nor was Moses, nor was Joseph, nor was David, nor was Josiah, nor was Hezekiah, nor were Isaac or Jacob. Noah, as the believer today, was saved by GRACE (Gen. 6:8) through FAITH (Heb. 11:7), but he knew nothing about ["a quickening spirit" ]{.class_4096}(1 Cor. 15:45).

["That\...he might shew the EXCEEDING RICHES OF HIS GRACE in his kindness toward us THROUGH CHRIST JESUS" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 7). Calvin and Co. read the passage as follows: "In Eternity, God will show us how lucky we were to have been chosen by a free caprice based on nothing but arbitrary pleasure, whereby He elected some and damned others so that He could manifest, not His ["grace,"]{.class_4096} but His [sovereignty ]{.class_4095}and [power ]{.class_4095}(Rom. 9:21--24). (Neither is that overstretching the case, no matter how much howling goes up from the dead‑orthodox apostates who worship Pink, Shelton, and Gilpin!)

Observe that all the grace and all the kindness comes ["through Christ Jesus" ]{.class_4096}(cf. remarks on 1:4--5, 10). We are back again to the []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_214}impassable blockade. Although God gives ANY sinner enough faith to be saved (Rom. 10:4--8), and although this faith is only given by God's grace, because it is undeserved (Eph. 2:8), no sinner can learn anything about being "chosen in Him" (1:4) or the ["exceeding riches of his grace" ]{.class_4096}or being "saved by grace" (2:5, 7) until he is WILLING to receive the Lord Jesus Christ as his own Saviour (John 1:12). Belief will not do it (Acts 8:13). Baptism will not do it (Judas! Matt. 10:4). A miracle ministry will not do it (Matt. 10:8 cf. 7:22). Repentance and confession will not do it (Matt. 27:3). And believing the Fundamentals (Mark 1:24) will not do it (James 2:19). There must be a heart reception of the truth (Rom. 10:9‑10) and a laying hold of God's provision (Rom. 6:17).

God doesn't "quicken" [anyone ]{.class_4095}who rejects His Son. (The word ["quickened"]{.class_4096} is defined in 1 Peter 3:18 and other places.)

Now, going from "the sublime to the ridiculous," we turn to "the greatest accredited Conservative scholars" of the centuries, who have at their disposal---if we are stupid enough to believe them!---the most modern "scientific" tools for research known to man, etc.

1\. You are not "saved by grace" (vs. 5); you are in a ["saved state"]{.class_4095} (Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown)!

2\. You are not "saved by grace"; you are in a ["state of salvation" ]{.class_4095}(Kenneth Wuest).

3\. You were NOT ["dead IN SINS"]{.class_4096} (vs. 5); you were dead ["THROUGH your trespasses" ]{.class_4095}([RV, ASV, RSV]{.class_4095}).

4\. You are not ["in heavenly places"]{.class_4096} (vs. 6); you are ["ruling" ]{.class_4095}(!!!!) in the ["heavenly WORLD"]{.class_4095} ([Good News for Modern Man]{.class_4095}).

5\. You are not ["in the heavenly places"]{.class_4096}; you are in the ["heavenly sphere"]{.class_4095} ([Amplified New Testament]{.class_4095}).

6\. ["The ages to come"]{.class_4096} (vs. 7) should have been ["in the next world" ]{.class_4095}(Harless, Olshausen, DeWette, and Meyer)!

7\. No! No! It should be ["in this world" ]{.class_4095}(Alford and Ellicott).

8\. You are NOT ["IN HEAVENLY PLACES in Christ Jesus" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 6); you are only "potentially" there! [(Wycliffe Commentary,]{.class_4095} pg. 1306)!

9\. We are now "enthroned" in Heaven ([NEB, ]{.class_4095}1961)!

Now, if you were gullible enough to think that the greatest scholarship in the world was able to correct the [Authorized ]{.class_4095}Holy []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_215}Bible simply because they hid behind a "majority," you came out of this maelstrom believing the following:

1\. You are at present in a "saved state" out of which you might fall. (The word [state ]{.class_4095}is not the same as [standing]{.class_4095}---see 1 John 4:17---and you are a dunce if you think that the meanings are the same---see Num. 23:21.)

2\. In this "state," you are a king on a throne ruling a heavenly kingdom which is spreading in "this world" and will soon usher in---through the help of the NEA, the HEW, the CIA, Joseph Fletcher, Mary Calderone, [Life, Look, ]{.class_4095}and Ralph Abernathy---"the world of tomorrow."

That is, if you were naive enough to think that any [scholar ]{.class_4095}could correct one word of the [AV ]{.class_4095}1611 without eventually leading you into error, you laid yourself wide open to total rejection of the truth. [Three fundamental Biblical doctrines have been altered in this passage by the work of the Conservative commentators and scholars since 1880. ]{.class_4095}And we may say---without the least courtesy or regard for the feelings of anyone involved---that the [King James ]{.class_4095}Bible, here, as in all places, is thoroughly able to criticize, dissect, analyze, and correct ANY scholar of any degree of attainment, with any amount of learning. Phenomenon No. 9.

2:8 For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God:

9 Not of works, lest any man should boast.

10 For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which God hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

11 Wherefore remember, that ye being in time past Gentiles in the flesh, who are called Uncircumcision by that which is called the Circumcision in the flesh made by hands;

12 That at that time ye were without Christ, being aliens from the commonwealth of Israel, and strangers from the covenants of promise, having no hope, and without God in the world:

13 But now in Christ Jesus ye who sometimes were far []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_216}off are made nigh by the blood of Christ.

Verse 8 is the most familiar verse of Scripture in the Pauline teaching on HOW a sinner is saved. All other references, such as Acts 2:38; James 2:26; Romans 8:24; and Matthew 24:13, must be judged in the light of this passage, for this passage is aimed directly at the New Testament Gentile believer who has experienced New Testament salvation.

["For by GRACE are ye saved through FAITH; and THAT not of yourselves: it is the GIFT OF GOD" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 8). All is vivid and understandable. There are no complexities in the verse, nor any deep and dark involvements like we run into in trying to explain Acts 2:38; Matthew 24:13; James 2:26; and Romans 8:24. The unregenerate Bible teacher will run immediately to these complex verses to negate the clear ones. The unregenerate man will always have an affinity for passages that emphasize WORKS (see [The Bible Believer's Commentary on Revelation, ]{.class_4095}Rev 12:17). But here it is GRACE, and it is ["NOT OF WORKS, lest any man should boast" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 9).

All of the scholars but Wuest omit the article before ["grace" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 8). Phenomenon No. 6.

If one single thing is clear in the Pauline Epistles, this is it. Grace is not works (Rom. 11:6); works are not grace (Rom. 11:6). God will not justify a man who "works at it" (Rom. 4:5), for by works shall no man be justified (Gal. 3:11). Salvation is not merely a ["GIFT"]{.class_4096} (Eph. 2:8), it is a ["free gift"]{.class_4096} (Rom. 5:15), freely given (Rom. 5:16). This ["unspeakable GIFT" ]{.class_4096}(2 Cor. 9:15) cannot be purchased or borrowed, and it certainly cannot be stolen (John 10:1--5). It is a ["gift of righteousness"]{.class_4096} (Rom. 5:17) given by the Holy Ghost (Acts 8:20), and only the man who believes on Christ to the point of RECEIVING HIM (John 1:12) gets the gift. You [get no gift without receiving it ]{.class_4095}(1 Pet. 4:10). The man who believes and does not RECEIVE is kin to Satan (James 2:19).

["And THAT not of yourselves ]{.class_4096}(vs. 8). As a young man said one time when he was being "examined" by a board of elders, "Salvation was part God's work and part mine. I resisted Him all I could, and He did the rest." Even the faith by which the sinner []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_217}receives Christ is a free gift of grace which came by the word of God (Rom. 10:4--8, 17). The difference between sinners lies only in the WILL. Two men run from God; both get under conviction; God gives them both the faith to believe and the grace to accept the Gift. One [accepts ]{.class_4095}it (Acts 14:22), and the other [rejects ]{.class_4095}it (Acts 13:45).

While the [Amplified ]{.class_4095}twists verse 8 to get out of the Hyper‑Calvinistic overtones, Williams steps right on in and states that God picks up "a sinner" (notice the election "bit"!) and makes him the subject of a new creation. This, of course, is nonsense. The Lord did it in the case of Paul, but to say that Paul was not making one "moral movement" toward God before his conversion (Williams Commentary, pg. 922) is preposterous. Paul made more moral movements toward God before he was thirteen than most of the commentators did after they were thirty. (The insertion of a reference to the Law at this point, following ["not of works"]{.class_4100}[ ]{.class_4096}\[[Amplified New Testament]{.class_4095}\][, is ]{.class_4095}completely irrelevant. Works of [any kind ]{.class_4095}are the subject of the passage. Compare remarks on "faith" under Galatians 3:11).

We are seated with Christ in the "heavenlies," and He is seated in us in the "earthlies" (Col. 1:27). We cannot boast up there, and we cannot boast down here. No Campbellite will open his mouth in Heaven about his "repentance and his BUPtism." No Jehovah's Witness will dare make a peep about "obeying" the commission of Matthew 24. No Catholic will look on God's face and mention "sacraments" and "penance" at the same time. No Buddhist or Hindu will open his yap about "attaining" states of Nirvana and Samadhi. And no Seventh‑day Adventist will mention his keeping of ONE commandment, let alone all TEN! In this dispensation, you are saved, justified, and kept by a transaction that begins and ends with grace; and the first time some idiot in glory starts talking about "living a good life" and "keeping the commandments" and "doing good to his fellow man," the angels, the Body of Christ, archangels, cherubim, and seraphim will boo him so loudly you will think Revelation 20:11 took place prematurely.

["For we are HIS WORKMANSHIP\...unto GOOD WORKS\...that we should walk in them" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 10). Again, Calvin and Co. misread it as follows: "For God did His work on us [before we were saved ]{.class_4095}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_218}and completed it without our will or knowledge, and now, isn't it a wonderful thing we found out about it?" But of course, this is just Bullinger and Stam all over again, trying to read their theology back into the Scripture. The verse is plainly talking about what God did to you [after ]{.class_4095}you received Jesus Christ!

Observe\![ "Created IN Christ Jesus" ]{.class_4096}(cf. comments under 1:4). No unsaved man was ever created ["IN"]{.class_4096} Christ Jesus. ["If any man be IN CHRIST, he is a new creature" ]{.class_4096}(2 Cor. 5:17), but there are no "new creatures" or even "new creations" (if you want to mess it up like the [New "Scofield" Reference Bible) ]{.class_4095}OUTSIDE of "Christ Jesus." Calvin's reading is not merely preposterous, it is ridiculous. You see, the whole point in altering ["creature"]{.class_4096} (2 Cor. 5:17) to "creation" was to insert the idea that God created something out of the sinner [without the consent of his will.]{.class_4095}

If there is any doubt in your mind about that, observe the fantastic conclusion arrived at by Dummelow (Commentary, pg. 962) by using the word "creation." [Dummelow states that the WHOLE HUMAN RACE was reunited in Christ and got ]{.class_4095}off [to afresh start! ]{.class_4095}This is the "other end" of Calvin's stick. If the work was automatic, you can go left and obtain [universal salvation, ]{.class_4095}or you can go right and wind up with [irresistible grace on a minority.]{.class_4095}

The "middle of the stick" is the [King James ]{.class_4095}text, and the verse is as clear as the lens of the Mt. Palomar telescope. The verse has nothing to do with a pre‑salvation experience. The man was saved in verse 5, and every "scholar" on the market since 1880 translated the participle of that verse in the past tense---"has been saved," "have been saved." How [then did they miss the application five verses later? ]{.class_4095}Phenomenon No. 8.

God ordained that when a man is ["a new creature"]{.class_4096} (not "creation") in Christ, he SHOULD walk in the path of good works (Tit. 2:14). The[ "new creature"]{.class_4096} does not work to GET saved, nor does he work to STAY saved; he works because he IS saved. The only sense in which salvation is by works is, "God's work first, my work second." My works come from the Holy Spirit who is working on me (John 16:8) and in me (Phil. 2:13), and His works have to do with a completed atonement offered freely to me.

The ["good works"]{.class_4096} were prepared by the Lord ahead of time for those who wind up in Christ ([]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_219}["which God hath before ORDAINED"]{.class_4096}), and these ["good works"]{.class_4096} are clearly listed in the remainder of the epistle (Eph. 4--6). Here, the [Amplified ]{.class_4095}suddenly swings back to the Calvinist position and takes the liberty to inform us that God "prearranged" the life we are to live. This is a little strong. The correct word was in the [King James ]{.class_4095}text---["SHOULD walk in them." ]{.class_4096}Only Calvin was forced against his will to walk on a prearranged course determined before the foundation of the world! Peter, James, Paul, and John had a little more liberty! Note how ["ordained"]{.class_4096} couldn't bind Paul in 1 Corinthians 9:14--15!

["Gentiles in the flesh\...Uncircumcision...Circumcision in the flesh" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 11). Again, the Holy Spirit points out the difference between Jew, Gentile, and Church. ["In the flesh"]{.class_4096} is used here exactly as it was used in Romans 2:28; 2 Corinthians 10:3; and Galatians 6:12, which see. The "old nature" is not a point in question. He is talking about the body you walk around in geographically. (The Greek Gnostics may have been off base 90 percent of the time, but when they spoke of the evil residing in matter where it dealt with the human body, they had the greatest proof in the universe on their side. Every human body in the world rots and decomposes---[the worms eat it. ]{.class_4095}Furthermore, you were told that it was under a curse and would die.)

"W[ithout Christ\...aliens from the commonwealth\...strangers from the covenants\...no hope\...without God in the world" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 12). This is the "elect" about whom Calvin and Berkhof have so much to say. They seem to have corroded a little since they were "in Christ before the foundation of the world, etc." (cf. comments under 1:4 and Gal. 1:15--16).

The "elect" were without hope, ["without God,"]{.class_4096} without Christ, without promise, ["without excuse"]{.class_4096} (Rom. 1:20), and ["without strength"]{.class_4096} (Rom. 5:6). They, therefore, were never "in Christ" until the day they were sealed by the Holy Spirit. This never happened before they trusted Christ (Eph. 1:4--5); until then, God did not even recognize them (Gal. 4:9)!

God's foreknowledge, then, sees [every possible variation ]{.class_4095}of every possible [combination of infinite possibilities ]{.class_4095}in time and []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_220}eternity and, on the basis of the sinner's WILLINGNESS to respond, predestinates that sinner to be ["conformed to the image of his Son" ]{.class_4096}(Rom. 8:29). No "merit" is involved; no "works" are involved. The only thing that differentiates the "elect" from every Hell‑bound depraved sinner in this world is that the "elect" vote for Jesus Christ and the non‑elect vote for themselves or the world or the Devil [or all three! ]{.class_4095}You cannot get "elected" until you're "nominated," and God doesn't nominate anybody who is unwilling to receive His Son.

["The commonwealth"]{.class_4096} and[ "the covenants"]{.class_4096} (vs. 12) are connected with the nation of Israel (Rom. 11), and this explains the peculiar transition found in Acts 8:14--17. Not even the Church "which is His Body" (to cite Bullinger) is exempt from this connection (Eph. 2:20--21), and PROPHETS (Eph. 2:20) are in the Church "which is His Body" (Eph. 4:11). This is "most embarrassing" to Bullinger, and in his lengthy appendix (No. 189), he simply refuses to comment on the CONTEXT of the verse! [The context of Ephesians 4 is the Body of Christ ]{.class_4095}(or "the church of the one body"---to cite the cliché).

We will not waste time with the useless conjectures of the revisers and commentators on the passage; none of them amount to anything. If it were not for the book publishing business, their works would have never been printed to start with.

["BUT NOW in Christ Jesus ye who sometimes were FAR OFF are made nigh BY THE BLOOD OF CHRIST" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 13). The squeamish translators of ["Good News" ]{.class_4095}coyly trample underfoot the ["blood of Christ"]{.class_4096} and translate "death of Christ," which isn't found in ANY Greek manuscript in the universe.

The meaning is clear. The saved Ephesians to whom Paul is writing were ["far off']{.class_4096} from God, and they are now ["nigh"]{.class_4096} to God. This was done by Jesus Christ shedding His blood on Calvary's cross. All of the revisers grasp this truth, but not one in any 20,000 found the reference in Hebrews 9:14 which states that the saved sinner is part of Christ's "blood stream" and has access in any century to the blood that was shed 1940 years ago (cf. Eph. 5:30 and comments). The historical context is plainly Calvary (see vs. 16), but the blood shed at Calvary goes out through the "deeps." Since it is eternal blood (Lev. 17:14; Acts 20:28; 1 John 5:8), those who experience its []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_221}cleansing flow are made "nigh to God" at the moment in which they place their trust in its finished work. The Spirit (vs. 18) ["by"]{.class_4096} whom we have access to God, at this present moment, is equated with the BLOOD (1 John 5:8) ["by"]{.class_4096} which we are now nigh at this present moment---not nineteen centuries back.

2:14 For he is our peace, who hath made both one, and hath broken down the middle wall of partition between us;

15 Having abolished in his flesh the enmity, even the law of commandments contained in ordinances; for to make in himself of twain one new man, so making peace;

16 And that he might reconcile both unto God in one body by the cross, having slain the enmity thereby:

17 And came and preached peace to you which were afar off, and to them that were nigh.

18 For through him we both have access by one Spirit unto the Father.

19 Now therefore ye are no more strangers and foreigners, but fellowcitizens with the saints, and of the household of God;

20 And are built upon the foundation of the apostles and prophets, Jesus Christ himself being the chief corner stone;

21 In whom all the building fitly framed together groweth unto an holy temple in the Lord:

22 In whom ye also are builded together for an habitation of God through the Spirit.

Now Bullinger and the Hyperdispensationalists are in trouble. What follows would indicate that the groundwork for the "Church which is His Body" (see distortions of emphasis under 1:22--23) was finished BEFORE Pentecost. This is quite clear in what follows.

1\. That ["middle wall of partition" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 14) between Jew and Gentile was NOT broken down in the book of the Acts; [it was broken down in Matthew 27]{.class_4095}!

2\. The ["one new man" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 15; see 4:13--16) was "made one" (vs. 14) before Acts 1, and if he was not "made one" before Acts 1, Calvary made it [possible ]{.class_4095}(vs. 16) for him to be made []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_222}[before Acts 1.]{.class_4095}

3\. In the building that follows---whether you identify it as the Body or not---the Ephesian converts are included with PROPHETS and APOSTLES. (Note the plural!)

4\. Furthermore, observe that this ["building" ]{.class_4096}was not erected until AFTER Calvary. The ["household" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 19) may have been something else (cf. comments under 3:15), but the BUILDING is post‑resurrection.

Now, these facts need to be observed, for accompanying the present folding up of Bible‑teaching and Bible‑preaching local churches and the gathering of the ecumenical zoo, there will be found a divisive faction among the Christians themselves which teaches that the "Church" begins [after Acts 28, ]{.class_4095}or at least [after Acts 9]{.class_4095}. The FRUITS of this division are always a proud, rebellious spirit of independence that refuses to be corrected or "preached at," an absolute refusal to go along with conventional Christian practices on the grounds that they are not "Scriptural," and a Pharisaical way of\
demanding "a verse of Scripture" for everything [except for what the discordant ones themselves practice! ]{.class_4095}(When one of these brethren asked for a verse commanding water baptism, I gave him James 4:17. If water baptism is not[ "good,"]{.class_4096} it is ["sin"]{.class_4096} (see 1 John 5:17) and if you have "sinned," you need to confess it and ask forgiveness! Strangely enough, this "Scriptural giant" had never confessed the sin of having been baptized, and he, like 80 percent of his own crowd, [HAD been baptized!)]{.class_4095}

The obvious implication of Ephesians 2:12--22 is that Calvary opened the way for Jew and Gentile to be saved and forgiven, and that at the same time, it opened a way for Jew and Gentile to be part of a spiritual building which is ["in the Lord" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 21) ["through the Spirit" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 22) and is a living organism (vs. 21---["all the building\...GROWETH"]{.class_4096}). This would clearly indicate that Acts 2 was the actual carrying out of the preparations.

All of the alibies given by Baker, O'Hair, Stam, and Bullinger can never alter these truths. The ancient cliché, "since Pentecost and Joel 2 were [revealed truths, ]{.class_4095}the Church couldn't have started in Acts 2 because the Church [was not revealed," is ]{.class_4095}simply pious hogwash. God can start anything He jolly well pleases, any time He jolly well []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_223}likes; and if He doesn't wish to reveal it till 3,000,000 years later, that is nobody's business but His. (Hyperdispensationalists go right on with these outworn clichés just as though they thought they had good sense.) The Body of Christ could have been started in Matthew 26:28 for all you know, and it was just waiting [for members to join it! ]{.class_4095}Now there is a soul‑shattering thought!

In the passage, there is one of the most striking proofs imaginable that the Body of Christ was present long before Paul wrote Ephesians. And this proof has been laid out by the Holy Spirit just preceding chapter 3 (cf. comments under 3:5, 8--9) so that no one could misread chapter 3. The proof is as follows.

Paul states that on Calvary's cross in Matthew 27, the Lord Jesus ["abolished\...the law of commandments contained in ordinances" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 15); and every Stamite and Bullingerite under heaven will agree to this (cf. Col. 2:14). Yet what Stam and Bullinger and the "Bereans" never considered, was that not even the elders and apostles at Jerusalem were certain of this [until Acts 15, ]{.class_4095}and as late as Acts 10, Peter had no knowledge of it at all!

So before the "Berean" commits theological suicide in chapter 3 and tries to prove that the Church BEGAN [when it was revealed, ]{.class_4095}he should take a long look at chapter 2 and sigh deeply. You see, the Lord DOES do some things that are not "revealed" till years later. Verse 15 is [absolute proof ]{.class_4095}that this is so, [and Paul knows that it is so when he writes it!]{.class_4095}

The saved Gentile is reconciled to God (as the saved Jew) by accepting the sacrificial death of Jesus Christ. To Calvin, this "accepting" is an automatic operation, and it is also an automatic operation to the Liberal whose viewpoint is well expressed in the [NEB ]{.class_4095}(1961) in verse 15. The verse in this apostate "Bible" (C. H. Dodd was head of the committee) is treated so that it states that Christ's death caused to be ["created"]{.class_4095} a ["single new HUMANITY."]{.class_4095} This is [basically the position of Karl Marx and the Health, Education, and Welfare Board in the United States. ]{.class_4095}The phrase "finish now thy new creation" (in the familiar Anglican Hymn "Love Divine, All Love Excelling") is the same sentiment, for the man who wrote this hymn believed that the "new creation" of Revelation 21:1--2 was a [spiritual society ]{.class_4095}on this [present planet. ]{.class_4095}(See lengthy analysis in [The Sure Word of Prophecy, ]{.class_4095}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_224}1969.) Isn't it strange what "accredited scholarship" gets into when it begins to produce "Bibles" that are "easier to understand"?

Christ is ["our peace"]{.class_4096} (vs. 14), and through Him, ["we have peace with God" ]{.class_4096}(Rom. 5:1). The reading ["let us have peace with God,"]{.class_4095} found in the [NEB ]{.class_4095}(1961) and suggested by the [RV, ASV, RSV, ]{.class_4095}and Phillips, is the reading of Marcion the heretic (A.D. 160) found in the original copies of [D, Aleph,]{.class_4095} and [B ]{.class_4095}([Vaticanus]{.class_4095}). ["Our peace"]{.class_4096} implies peace for Jew (["to them that were NIGH"]{.class_4096})[ ]{.class_4096}and Gentile (["to you which were AFAR OFF"]{.class_4096}).[ ]{.class_4096}This quotation should never be confounded with Acts 2:39--40, for Peter in Acts 2 is citing Daniel 9:7, which see. ["The middle wall of partition" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 14) is supposed to be an allusion to the wall separating the court of the Jews from the court of the Gentiles in Herod's Temple (cf. 1 Chron. 28:10 in relation to vs. 18).

The building described in the passage is a [growing organism ]{.class_4101}with "living stones" (1 Pet. 2:4--6). Since this strongly resembles the "Church of the one Body," Bullinger does several outside loops and barrel‑rolls at this point to avoid being shot out of the air. First, he insists that ["the apostles and prophets" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 20) are NOT part of the foundation, but that the foundation was ["laid" ]{.class_4101}by ["the apostles and prophets."]{.class_4096} That is, he privately interprets the verse to mean what he had already privately interpreted it to mean! But this doesn't get rid of the living building that ["groweth"]{.class_4096} (vs. 21), so he now tells us that it should have been "EVERY building" instead of ["all the building."]{.class_4096}

But we can tell when a man has run out of blue chips, and it is time for Ethelbert to cash in and go back to "Hearts" or "Rook." As we have stated elsewhere, no man tries to alter the [King James ]{.class_4095}text unless he is trying to prove a private interpretation that the [King James ]{.class_4095}text does not teach, as it stands.

In 500 B.C., Lycurgus said to an ambassador, "There are the walls of Sparta, and every man is a brick!" He was referring to a spiritual wall whose bricks could "grow."

The connection between the[ "building" ]{.class_4096}and the ["body" ]{.class_4096}is so strong that Bullinger cannot possibly get out of what follows, for what follows (3:1) states that Paul was in prison for preaching the ["one new man" ]{.class_4096}of chapter 2. Observe---["For this cause"]{.class_4096}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_225} (3:1). And this opener is followed immediately by a history of the revelation of the mystery of the "one Body." Therefore, to reach the position of Stam and Bullinger in regard to the TIME of the formation of the Body of Christ, one must do the following:

1\. Ignore the fact that the opportunity was [available ]{.class_4095}at the end of Matthew 27.

2\. Ignore the fact that ["the apostles and prophets"]{.class_4096} of Acts 1--15 were in the foundation, of which Christ was the corner stone.

3\. Ignore the context of chapter 2 which leads into ["For this cause" ]{.class_4096}in the very next chapter.

4\. Ignore the fact that all of the original eleven apostles were IN Christ and IN God and IN the Godhead, with Christ IN them and them IN Him (John 17:21--23) [before Paul was converted.]{.class_4095}

5\. Ignore the fact that the "Ephesians" were IN Christ and in the "one Body" as far back as Acts 18--19, which was seven to ten years [before Paul wrote ]{.class_4095}the Epistle to the Ephesians.

To ignore this mass of clear Biblical truth is to earmark a theology for a famous category: [the category of the cults. ]{.class_4095}A thousand stratagems have been resorted to in order to push the formation of the "Body" beyond Acts 2. We are told that the ["apostles"]{.class_4096} in the passage are like Barnabas, Sosthenes, Silvanus, and Timotheus (Williams, pg. 830). We are told that the Church could not have started in Acts 2 because the Church was the subject of revelation, not prophecy, and Acts 2 was "prophesied." We are told that even though Paul was baptized in water and baptized others in water (Acts 18:8), it was through ignorance, and gradually, he came to realize that water baptism was a "sign" and therefore part of the Jewish legal "ordinances." We are told that "the Twelve"[ ]{.class_4096}(Acts 1:1--4, 13) were in a different body than the Body of Christ. We are told that if Peter, James, and John (and the Old Testament prophets) had known nothing about the formation of the "one Body," it couldn't have taken place. We are told everything but the truth.

The truth of the matter is that [every man from Acts 2 to the Rapture was baptized by one baptism into one Body ]{.class_4095}(and Paul makes this abundantly clear in 4:5); and although [what attended those conversions ]{.class_4095}may vary as much as Acts 2:38, Acts 8:15--16, Acts 10:46--47, and Acts 19:4--6, the [operation]{.class_4095}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1507.xhtml_page_226} (1 Cor. 12:6) was the same. To [divide ]{.class_4095}the Body of Christ by insisting that there were different SPIRIT baptisms (cf. comments on 4:5) is to go exactly contrary to the spirit of the context of 4:4--5, [which was a plea for UNITY.]{.class_4095}

Williams chooses the "every" of Bullinger's reading (vs. 21) and sides with the monumental work of corruption in the Nineteenth Century, the [RV ]{.class_4095}(1881), which reads "several" for ["all."]{.class_4096}

[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml}

## Chapter 3 {.heading_116}

3:1 For this cause I Paul, the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,

2 If ye have heard of the dispensation of the grace of God which is given me to you‑ward:

3 How that by revelation he made known unto me the mystery; (as I wrote afore in few words,

4 Whereby, when ye read, ye may understand my knowledge in the mystery of Christ)

5 Which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of men, as it is now revealed unto his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit;

6 That the Gentiles should be fellowheirs, and of the same body, and partakers of his promise in Christ by the gospel:

7 Whereof I was made a minister, according to the gift of the grace of God given unto me by the effectual working of his power.

This is the great "Berean" passage for "wrongly dividing the word of truth." As we have said elsewhere, Bullinger's main problem was a lack of ability to think rationally in dealing with problems of time and progressive revelation. To Ethelbert Bullinger---as to Cornelius Stam and J. C. O'Hair---God can do little or nothing until it is revealed. This is not "oversimplification"; this is the root of the problem. In what follows, the reader should keep in mind that Bullinger and the Bereans are reading:

1\. No revelation of the mystery until the Church began, and it began with Paul (Stam).

2\. No revelation of the mystery until the Church began, and it began after Acts 28 (Bullinger).

["For this cause" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 1). ["This cause" ]{.class_4096}causes a panic, for the[ "cause"]{.class_4096} referred to is the preceding exposition on the ["building"]{.class_4096} (2:14--22).

["If ye have heard of the DISPENSATION OF THE GRACE OF GOD\..."]{.class_4096}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_228} (vs. 2). Most Bullingerites misread it as "a dispensation or period of time which is characterized by salvation through grace began when I \[i.e., Paul\] got saved." But the grace was dispensed to Paul to be ministered to others. Cornelius was saved by grace (Acts 10:44) while Paul was hibernating in Arabia, and the eunuch (Acts 8:32--37) was saved by grace BEFORE Paul fell off his horse. If that weren't enough, the dying thief (Luke 23:42--43) got saved by grace (in spite of the [American Standard Version ]{.class_4095}and ["New" American Standard Version!) ]{.class_4095}before Peter talked in tongues. The "Dispensation of Grace," as a period of time, is a little farstretched. Noah, Adam, Abel, and Abraham were all saved by grace through faith apart from the works of the Law, and Adam was saved apart from [any works ]{.class_4095}(cf. Eph. 2:9). To obtain Stam's reading, one must take the word ["to"]{.class_4096} (["TO you‑ward"]{.class_4096}) and put it before[ "me,"]{.class_4096} thus reading, "The Dispensation of the Grace of God which was given TO me." But of course, this is changing the Bible again to suit your fancy. (If your fancy isn't God's fancy, keep your hands off the Bible!)

Now, the grace which God gave to Paul (2 Cor. 12:9) enabled him to understand the mystery ["which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of men" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 5).

["How that BY REVELATION" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 3; cf. Gal. 1:10--12). The Lord had promised to give Paul advanced revelation (Acts 22:14 cf. John 16:12).

["HE MADE KNOWN UNTO ME THE MYSTERY" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 3). Observe that no statement is made to the effect that God STARTED the[ "mystery"]{.class_4096} with Paul. ["By revelation,"]{.class_4096} the Lord [made something known ]{.class_4095}to him, and he had already spoken of it (["as I wrote afore in few words"]{.class_4096}) before this time. The ["afore"]{.class_4096} mentioned words are Romans 16:25 according to Bullinger, but they are Ephesians 1:3‑10 according to Williams. However, they are Ephesians 1:9--10 according to Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown (and the Wycliffe Commentary also); but they are the [first two chapters ]{.class_4095}according to Dummelow! (Would anybody else care to step up and try their luck!? Three balls for a quarter! Right this way!)

However, Galatians 2:2 is far, far better; and 1 Corinthians 12 is even better. Paul said nothing about writing to the Ephesians when he said ["as I wrote afore in few words," ]{.class_4096}and he had been talking about the ["body" ]{.class_4096}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_229}as far back as Acts 15--16 (cf. comments under Gal. 2:1--3).

You see, the ["mystery" ]{.class_4096}was [not ]{.class_4095}that there would be a Church [which was ]{.class_4095}His Body. The mystery is defined in verse 6: ["That the Gentiles should be FELLOWHEIRS AND OF THE SAME BODY."]{.class_4096}

Paul knew about Jew and Gentiles being ["one body"]{.class_4096} in Christ every time he picked up his pen. He mentions it in Romans 16:25; he mentions it in Romans 2--3; he mentions it clear through 1 Corinthians 12; he mentions it in Galatians 2; he mentions it in Romans 12:4; and he mentions it in Colossians 1 and 3. Therefore, to say that Paul didn't know about the mystery [until he wrote Ephesians]{.class_4095}---let alone[ ]{.class_4095}that the Body wasn't [there ]{.class_4095}until Ephesians!---is as blind a piece of exposition as you ever picked up in your life.

Furthermore, Paul (knowing the "mystery of the Body") goes right back into the Old Testament and applies the Millennial promises (and even some Tribulation-Jewish promises!) to saved Gentiles in the Body of Christ (cf. comments under Gal. 4:27). This led John R. Rice to believe that the "Church" began with Adam! But Bullinger is driven to the other extreme and is forced to get rid of the whole book of Romans because of Paul's handling of the references in Romans 15. Faced with an impossible situation at Romans 16:25, Bullinger blithely tells us that it was ADDED [at the time of the writing of the Ephesians ]{.class_4095}([Companion Bible,]{.class_4095} pg. 1694). But we know a stampede when we see it. Nobody who believes the Bible "says what it means and means what it says" has to panic.)

Bullinger obviously is deeply disturbed by the TRUTH. On page 42 of his work [How to Enjoy Your Bible, ]{.class_4095}he says that "God carefully kept the Church out of the Old Testament." But the Lord was not as careful as Bullinger gave Him credit for being. Eve is said to be a type of the Church by Paul himself, [in the very book where the "mystery" is supposed to be revealed ]{.class_4095}(cf. 5:31 and comments)! Furthermore, the greatest type of Christ in the Bible (Joseph---see [The Bible Believer's Commentary on Genesis, ]{.class_4095}1970) marries a Gentile bride, exactly as Moses and David did. Bullinger's "Jewish bride" (Acts 1--28 and the Tribulation) was BLACK (Song of Sol. 1:6)!

No, Bullinger and Stam missed a few tricks (and several hundred []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_230}verses). The truth of the matter is that the Lord set things up so He [could go ]{.class_4095}into either a Tribulation or a Church Age [up until Acts 7]{.class_4095}\![ ]{.class_4095}If the prophecies of Joel, Daniel, Isaiah, Hosea, and Zephaniah had been fulfilled in Acts 1--7, the Lord would simply have said nothing to anyone about any "Body mystery"; [and if He had, it still would have been a Jew‑Gentile body, for there are Jews and Gentiles "IN CHRIST" in Acts 2--6!]{.class_4095}

Paul got his revelations BEFORE Acts 15 (see 2 Cor. 12:2, 7). To say that he just got the revelation [at the time of the writing ]{.class_4095}of Ephesians is to stop up your ears, close your eyes, sniff airplane glue, and "freak out."

Ephesians 3, then, is merely a statement to the effect that God did reveal the mystery of the dual Body (Jew‑Gentile) to Paul and had not revealed it to anyone before Paul. That is the long and short of it, the middle and both ends, and everywhere in between. Not once is it even suggested that God had just shown Paul the ["mystery"]{.class_4096} [the moment that he penned Ephesians 3.]{.class_4095}

["Which in other ages WAS NOT MADE KNOWN unto the sons of men"]{.class_4096} (vs. 5). Observe that there is not one word about any ["body"]{.class_4096} being present or absent. The statement is only that the mystery of the dual Body (composed of Jew and Gentile) was ["not made known"]{.class_4096} (cf. 1 Pet. 1:10--12).

["Whereof I was made a minister, according to the GIFT OF THE GRACE OF GOD" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 7, which clearly defines vs. 2).

The mystery is ["NOW REVEALED" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 5) unto the ["holy apostles and prophets BY the Spirit"]{.class_4096}[---not BY Paul! To ]{.class_4095}get rid of the inference that Peter, John, James the Lord's brother, etc., ["NOW"]{.class_4096} knew as much about it as Paul, Williams hastily tells us that the[ "holy apostles"]{.class_4096} referred to are the ones of Romans 16:7; 1 Thessalonians 1: 1, 6, 2:4, 6; 1 Corinthians 4:6, 9, etc. (The word ["apostles"]{.class_4096} \[vs. 5\] is entirely missing in the Vatican manuscript.) But the effort is wasted. Either set (the "twelve" or the "eight") would know the mystery by the time of Ephesians, and this still has no bearing on when the Body started. In their mad rush to eliminate everything before Ephesians (so they can get rid of water baptism!), the "Bereans" forgot that [knowing about the mystery ]{.class_4095}still has no relation whatsoever to [when the Body began.]{.class_4095}

Getting our wits together, we see that the Body of Christ began in Acts 2, although a "way" was made for the formation of the Body by Christ's finished work of atonement at Calvary. This was unknown to the apostles and prophets of [Acts 1‑7, ]{.class_4095}and Peter purposely speaks of "sins being blotted out" at the Advent, [not at Calvary ]{.class_4095}(Acts 3:19). The Body could not be formed until Christ's physical body had gone back to Glory (cf. John 20:22). It is formed without anyone's knowledge, and it is not prophesied in the Old Testament to take place even though it [did ]{.class_4095}take place.

Having taken place, the Lord chooses to withhold revelation about the true nature of the transaction until He calls out the Apostle to the Gentiles (Rom. 16:25). The revelation of what actually took place is given to this man, and once he has it in his possession, he goes right slap back into the Old Testament (Rom. 15:9--12, 21) and produces verse after verse to prove that the truth was [dormant ]{.class_4095}in the Old Testament, even though it was not ["made known" ]{.class_4096}to the writers (1 Pet. 1:11--12).

There was a local church before Acts 2 (Matt. 18:17), but in Acts 2, it became a living organism by the power of the Holy Spirit. This ["body"]{.class_4096} will leave as fast as it came down (1 Cor. 15:51--52). Peter, James, and John were in it before Paul was (cf. Rom. 16:7), and the fact that they did not [have ]{.class_4095}the advanced revelations Paul got later means nothing at all in regard to the [starting place ]{.class_4095}of the "Body of the mystery."

3:8 Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ;

9 And to make all men see what is the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in God, who created all things by Jesus Christ:

10 To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God,

11 According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord:

12 In whom we have boldness and access with []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_232}confidence by the faith of him.

13 Wherefore I desire that ye faint not at my tribulations for you, which is your glory.

Paul refers to himself in the passage as ["less than the least of all saints" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 8), which is the middle point between ["not a whit behind the very chiefest apostles"]{.class_4096} (2 Cor. 11:5) and              ["sinners; of whom I am chief" ]{.class_4096}(1 Tim. 1:15). ["That I should preach among the Gentiles THE UNSEARCHABLE RICHES OF CHRIST" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 8). Paul is doing this [before ]{.class_4095}Acts 15, which is apparent from his visit to Jerusalem mentioned in Galatians 2:2.

There are a number of ["unsearchable"]{.class_4096} things about God.

a\. His peace is [past finding out ]{.class_4095}(Phil. 4:7).

b\. His gift cannot be [described ]{.class_4095}with words (2 Cor. 9:15).

c\. His love is [unquenchable ]{.class_4095}(Song of Sol. 8:7).

d\. His words are [unspeakable ]{.class_4095}(2 Cor. 12:4).

e\. His joy is [unspeakable ]{.class_4095}(I Pet. 1:8).

f\. His greatness is [infinite ]{.class_4095}(Psa. 145:3).

g\. His judgments are [unsearchable ]{.class_4095}(Rom. 11:33).

h\. And He Himself is [past finding out ]{.class_4095}(Job 11:7).

His Book is the King of books, the Book to end all books, and His Book will judge every other book in the day that the "books are opened" (Rev. 20:12). God's Book is "THE Book." (As J. J. Ray has so wisely said, [God Wrote Only One Book. ]{.class_4095}If you don't know which one it is, you'd better find out because there are over 400,000 on the market, and 135 different ones are masquerading as "Bibles.")

["What is the FELLOWSHIP OF THE MYSTERY, which from the BEGINNING OF THE WORLD hath been hid in God" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 9). Observe that the Lord could have mentioned the "Body" a thousand times in the Old Testament and nobody would have been any the wiser. It was a mystery ["hid IN GOD"]{.class_4096};[ ]{.class_4096}and God could have revealed it to Moses, David, Isaiah, Jeremiah, John the Baptist, Demas, Peter, James, Judas, Pilate, Dorcas, or Publius (Acts 28:7) if He had so desired. He revealed it to Paul; and part of Paul's ministry was letting Peter, James, John, et al. (["all men"]{.class_4096}---vs. 9) understand the mystery of Jew and Gentile together. He worked Simon Peter over a little with this back in Galatians 2, which see.

["To the intent that NOW unto the principalities and powers in heavenly places\..."]{.class_4096} (vs. 10). The creation and formation of the Church is to be a demonstration to the gentry of Ephesians 6:12 and Isaiah 24:21; for the Body of Him ["that filleth all in all" ]{.class_4096}(Eph. 1:23) fills the "breadth, length, depth, and height" of the universe (see comments on 3:18). The hosts of Heaven are now entangled with a spiritual Body that stretches from the planet Earth to the farthest confines of the "empty place over the north" (see [The Bible Believer's Commentary on Genesis, ]{.class_4101}Gen. 1--2). God's [physical creation ]{.class_4101}(Gen. 1), mentioned in Colossians 1:16--17, is now connected with His [spiritual creation; ]{.class_4101}hence, the words are inserted in verse 9---["who created all things by Jesus Christ."]{.class_4096}

Verse 11 is self‑explanatory (see 1:4 and comments).

["In whom we have BOLDNESS AND ACCESS WITH CONFIDENCE" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 12). Observe again the "outer space" references. Hebrews 4:16 shows that this is the Christian approaching the throne of the Majesty in Heaven, beyond ["all principality, and power\...not only in this world but also in that which is to come" ]{.class_4096}(see 1:21). [None of the major commentators caught the reference, because every commentator from Origen to English refused to translate the Greek "kai" in verse 19 ]{.class_4095}(see comments on that verse in this chapter).

Verse 13 is self‑explanatory (cf. 1 Cor. 4:9--14; Phil. 2:25--26).

3:14 For this cause I bow my knees unto the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,

15 Of whom the whole family in heaven and earth is named,

16 That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man;

17 That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love,

18 May be able to comprehend with all saints what is the breadth, and length, and depth, and height;

19 And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_234}God.

20 Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,

21 Unto him be glory in the church by Christ Jesus throughout all ages, world without end. Amen.

Here is another place where the "FUR hits the fan" (to rephrase an ancient Army expression!) for the commentators, because every outstanding commentator from Origen to English (nineteen centuries of Bible perversion!) idolized [education. ]{.class_4095}Ever since the first Christian College at Alexandria used the "allegorizing" method and the "spiritualizing" method of private interpretation, every major commentator since (if he worshipped the "mind") picked up SOME of this degenerate, God‑dishonoring, Bible‑rejecting, pagan philosophy. In Ephesians 3, the Lord unhorses the whole cavalry of egotists on one word of three letters!

["For this cause I bow my knees\..."]{.class_4096} (vs. 14). Notice how the phrase is identical to the one in 3:1. The ["cause"]{.class_4096}[ ]{.class_4095}of verse 14 is the material found in verses 7--13, and the[ "cause"]{.class_4096} of 3:1 is found in 2:14--22. You [cannot divide the building and the body.]{.class_4095}

["Unto the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 14). The Lord Jesus Christ is immediately shoved out of the Bible by Kenneth Wuest, Phillips, the [NEB, Good News, ]{.class_4095}and Rev. Salmond ([Expositor's Greek Testament, ]{.class_4095}Vol. 3, pg. 12). (This hustling around of God's Son originates at Alexandria, as usual. [Vaticanus ]{.class_4095}and [Sinaiticus ]{.class_4095}omit all three words.)

["Of whom THE WHOLE FAMILY in heaven and earth is named" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 15). The Liberal takes the passage to mean that God is everyone's father, and Demas, Pharaoh, Judas, Bloody Mary, David Livingstone, Abraham Lincoln, John Wilkes Booth, Lee Harvey Oswald, JFK, Charles Manson, Dillinger, Gen. William Booth, Bluebeard, Paul, James, Captain Kidd, Count Basie, Ho Chi Minh, DeGaulle, Hitler, Einstein, Eichmann, Kate Smith, and Martin Bormann are all "brothers and sisters" in Christ! (Kinda like Cain and Abel, huh?)

But the[ "family"]{.class_4096} is plainly [God's family, ]{.class_4095}and God plainly [names ]{.class_4095}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_235}His family. The ridiculous reading of Phillips---"from whom all fatherhood, earthly or heavenly, derives its name"---came from page 963 of Dummelow's Commentary, published in 1908. It leans strongly to the Liberal position which is apparent by Dummelow's comment on 2:14--16, which see. However, this reading is much more ancient than Dummelow. [The original is in the official Jesuit Bible of the Roman Catholic Church ]{.class_4095}(1582) and is still found in the Roman Catholic [Confraternity ]{.class_4095}edition of 1941.

Alford and Middleton (plus Vincent, Salmond, and Riddle) taught the translators of the [ASV ]{.class_4095}(1901) and the [RV ]{.class_4095}(1881) and the [RSV ]{.class_4095}(1946) to mistranslate ["the whole family" ]{.class_4096}as "every family," and Bullinger also adopts this reading---with ["Good News"]{.class_4095} and the [NEB ]{.class_4095}of C. H. Dodd. But ["the whole family" ]{.class_4096}is given in the English version of 1611.

Since this verse again throws a monkey wrench into Hyperdispensationalism, Bullinger devotes half a page ([Companion Bible,]{.class_4095} pg. 1771) to correcting the [AV ]{.class_4095}1611. In so doing, he gives us an insight into his true knowledge of the Bible; it is not much. Poor Ethelbert could only find THREE families, and all of the ones he lists were in the book of Acts!

But behold how great a matter a little truth kindles!

1\. A company of Gentile believers [before the Law: ]{.class_4095}Adam, Noah, et al.

2\. A company of Gentile believers made Hebrews [before the Law: ]{.class_4095}Abraham, Isaac, Jacob.

3\. A company of Jewish believers [under the Law: ]{.class_4095}Moses to John the Baptist.

4\. A company of Gentile believers [under the Law: ]{.class_4095}Romans 1--2.

5\. A Body of believers called out [in the Church Age ]{.class_4095}(Acts 2 to the Rapture).

6\. Tribulation [Jews ]{.class_4095}(Rev. 14:1--6).

7\. Tribulation [Gentiles ]{.class_4095}(Rev. 7:9--17).

8.[ Millennial ]{.class_4095}saints (Rev. 20:9).

Ah, the depths of the sixth-grade English! How unsearchable are its riches and its ways past the "originals"!

The lame alibi for changing ["whole" ]{.class_4096}to "every"---and then being unable to expound the resultant text!---was "no article" []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_236}(Phenomenon No. 9). And yet, every "manjack of 'em," including every Bible on the market, translated Acts 2:36 as ["all the house of Israel," ]{.class_4096}and there was no article there either!

(Now tell me. In "Bible translating," do you prefer to deal with a [Conservative ]{.class_4095}crook or an [Evangelial ]{.class_4095}crook or a [Catholic ]{.class_4095}crook or a [Liberal ]{.class_4095}crook or a F[undamentalist ]{.class_4095}crook? God has a[ "family"]{.class_4096} (Psa. 45:9--14), and in that family, there is ONE BRIDE (Eph. 5:27; 2 Cor 11:1--3). This Bride is for God's Son (Song of Sol. 6:9).[ She is not God's Bride; ]{.class_4095}she is Christ's WIFE (Eph. 5:30--32). She is ["black, but comely, O, ye daughters of Jerusalem" ]{.class_4096}(Song of Sol. 1:5). And she is no more "all Jewish" (Bullinger) than a meat counter in a Piggly Wiggly store.

Having missed the meat (and the meaning) of the verse, the [AV ]{.class_4095}critics are now headed for the disaster, and it is not long in coming.

["That he would grant you\..." ]{.class_4096}(vs. 16). This is the second prayer Paul makes for the Ephesian converts (see 1:16--20). This time, the petitions are as follows:

1\. That you might be ["strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 16).

2\. That Christ might really be at home and dwell comfortably ["in your hearts by faith" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 17).

3\. That you might be ["rooted and grounded in love," ]{.class_4096}as well as doctrine (vs. 17).

4\. That you might[ "be able to COMPREHEND with all saints what is THE BREADTH, AND LENGTH, AND DEPTH, AND HEIGHT" ]{.class_4096}(vs. 18).

Of what?

Why, "the breadth, and length, and depth, and height OF THE LOVE OF CHRIST" (vs. 19), of course! That is, it must mean this if you take the comments of the commentators and revisers seriously.

But there is not a Greek text in the world which reads in that fashion.

Furthermore, there is not an English translation from [Wycliffe ]{.class_4095}to the [AV ]{.class_4095}1611 that reads that way.

What has happened here? Could it be possible that 100 percent of []{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_237}the commentators in EVERY age are wrong where they correct the [AV ]{.class_4095}1611?

Now go pick them up. Check it out. Sit down and read what Bullinger, Dummelow, Clarke, Lange, Ellicott, Trench, DeWette, Wetstein, Starke, Lucke, Rendall, Blaikie, Abbott, Martin, Lightfoot, Meyer, Riddle, Olshausen, Schneckenburger, Pelt, Ironside, Hodge, Schaffer, Bengel, Darby, Van Osterzee, Stier, Kern, Pink, Weiss, Ruckert, Stanly, Weisinger, and Neander actually SAID about the passage.

Origen reads as Chrysostom; Chrysostom reads as Augustine; Augustine reads as Jerome; Jerome reads as Gregory; Gregory reads as Matthew Henry; Henry reads as Machen and Warfield; Machen and Warfield read as Westcott and Hort; Westcott and Hort read as Salmond; Salmond sums the thing up by saying that the "breadth, length, depth, and height" refer to either:

a\. The Christian church.

b\. The Temple.

d\. The mystery of the Cross.

e\. The wisdom of God.

f\. What God has revealed or done for us and in us.

g\. The love of God.

B. Thieme (Twentieth Century) [even checked the cross-references in his own Bible ]{.class_4095}(Phenomenon No. 8).

The word ["AND"]{.class_4096} (vs. 19) was joined to verse 18 as though ["the love of Christ" ]{.class_4096}was the genitive for the description. Now, how do you suppose it was possible for 30,000 "leading Bible scholars" in twenty centuries to forget that the SAME author wrote to the SAME type of converts in the SAME New Testament about the SAME subject? Turn to Romans 8:39.

Here, we have run smack into the transportation disaster of the ages, and there is nothing comparable to it in the history of land, sea, and air travel. Here, we have 30,000 "accredited scholars," representing [every theological viewpoint, ]{.class_4095}[]{#Qv_tx9OySRyw7xPkbX14HQ1639.xhtml_page_238}many of them holding three earned degrees, and 98 percent of them feeling perfectly capable of correcting the Bible which was responsible for their salvation, absolutely refusing to look up a reference to find out the meaning of a verse!
